reviews.review_description: On Note 5, black screen with some artifacts. Voice narration works.

developer_response.body: We pushed out an update for S6 today that *might* allow you to play. Please give it another try and let us know.

reviews.review_description: The idea is good, but the app is full of bugs, not nice graphics, for free good but not for 5 dollars!

developer_response.body:
Hey BobKing, thank you for your feedback! We truly appreciate when our players let us know about their experience. I wanted to reach out to let you know that we just updated Wonders of the World with patch 1.0.12, bringing many bug fixes that should allow our players to have a much smoother and immersive experience. If you decide to play it again, it would mean a lot to us if you could update your review to let us know your thoughts on the new update!
-Francesco

reviews.review_description: Love this app just learned about the city of Rhodes and the history of their statue of their sun god 'Colosus'. There are 2 more experiences Taj Mahal and Machu Pichu I'm sure they will be great too. I wish apps like these were recreated by big studios like Pixar, Disney etc in more amazing graphics and details. But maybe this is an old app made for s6 not newer phones like s8 and s9. Nonetheless one of the best experiences I rate it 5/5.

Beautiful game, lots of cool information. I can really see something like that being used to teach history on a classroom and kids being amazed by that. But there's some textures missing and moving around  is really hard. I'm giving it a 3 stars because although I couldn't play with those bugs I really see the potential to be one of my favorites on VR. I hope the developers update the app, and when they do, I'll be glad to update my review.

developer_response.body: Hey Camilla, thank you very much for your feedback! Our development team recently updated Wonders of the World with patch 1.0.12 which brings in many bug fixes across both the Oculus Go and GearVR platforms. We hope you decide to play the game again and feel free to update your review with your thoughts on the newest update! - Francesco

reviews.review_description: I had fun with this now yall need a new update on this so u can explore more

I was going to buy this app before they made it free. My thoughts might be different depending on what I paid, but at free it's absolutely worth a download. Interesting and fairly large environments, good storylines and tasks to follow, and learn as much or little history as you prefer.

The graphics aren't bad, though maybe not quite good enough to truly feel immersive. Ironically the best graphics for environment and people are in the tutorial. Solid job developer, and thank you for giving us a great app for free!

developer_response.body: Super appreciate the feedback and glad you enjoyed it. If you have any places you think we should add please let us know!

reviews.review_description: Unfortunately all I get is the sound and a black screen.

developer_response.body: Hi There, With today's updated (Dec 8th) We believe we have fixed the black texture bug on S6 as well as a story issue in Machu Picchu. We've also unlocked the game table in the atrium so you can play the games and take quizes without needing to play the levels. We hope this fixes any issues you're having. If it does please feel free to update your rating to something you feel is more appropriate! Thanks for the note and your support!

reviews.review_description: Very well done. Nice graphics and interface.

developer_response.body: Hey MikeUrilorib, thank you for your feedback! We recently updated Wonders of the World with patch 1.0.12 which brings several bug fixes across the Oculus Go and the GearVR platforms. We hope you play the most recent version of the game and if you enjoy it we hope to read an updated review in the near future! -Francesco

reviews.review_description: By MatterVR/UnrealEngine. Virtual environment tours/role-playing games for Peru, India & Greece.
Buggy: only sound, black screen

reviews.review_description:
I'm deaf.  Please add the option to have cc.  Other wise you are leaving out the deaf community

Edit.  I've seen it both ways. A fixed cc so when you move your head the cc stays in place .  So you can view the environment and still read what's going on
  And the bubbles like you suggested.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions and clarification of what you've used in the past. We'll put it on the list for future releases.

reviews.review_title: Favourite educational game and it’s free
reviews.review_description: This thing is great, teaches you in a adventure story form with choices you can make and mini games. I loved it.

I like the idea but I didn't get far. I tried the Machu picchu one, but it's not clear where I am able to walk to, and sometimes I don't even get the option to walk to a different spot. At some point I heard the woman's voice in the distance but I couldn't see her and I found no way to walk back up or further down the mountain. I can click some things in the distance but it doesn't always give me the option, and even if it does, the sound is too quiet to hear, I assume the woman I couldn't find anymore was explaining it. I closed the app down as I found no way to progress any further from the spot I was in and it wasn't working consistently in the things I could click on.

developer_response.body: Hey crazygirlie89, thank you so much for writing a review! Our development team has gone through the whole VR experience and fixed many bugs including the ones you mentioned. Thank you again for letting us know about your experience and we hope you play Wonders of the World again as we recently updated it with patch 1.0.12. The game is about exploration and we hope you will enjoy it! Feel free to update your review and let us know your thoughts on the new update. -Francesco

reviews.review_description: Purchased this but won't download, looking to get a refund right now......

developer_response.body: Hey Tracy, thank you very much for your feedback! Our developers recently updated Wonders of the World with patch 1.0.12 bringing many bug fixes! We hope that you will update your review if you decide to play the game again. -Francesco

reviews.review_description: I love the tutorial. Really helpful and the nod and Shake your head for yes and no was awesome. Made it feel more like you were there.

reviews.review_title: May not be much replay  value but
reviews.review_description:
May not be much replay  value but VERY GOOD, enjoyable & educational. Please add more sites to this great app.
Brooklyn Bridge? Seattle Space Needle? Great Wall? ...
This game is good and so are the graphics. It was easy to play and educational.

This is so flipping amazing 
It also helped me sturdy for history
